matrix.ac_text: Required fields order date, customer, and at least one line item must be present.
Invalid product codes must be rejected.
Tax should be calculated for taxable products.
Order creation event must be available to downstream integrations.
Only valid state transitions are allowed.
Cancelled orders cannot move to shipped.
Status updates must be visible in reporting and notifications.

readable.acText: Required fields order date, customer, and at least one line item must be present.
readable.title: Create order succeeds when order date, customer, and one line item are provided

readable.acText: Required fields order date, customer, and at least one line item must be present.
readable.title: Create order API accepts valid payload with multiple line items and required fields present

readable.acText: Required fields order date, customer, and at least one line item must be present.
readable.title: Create order UI blocks save when customer is not selected

readable.acText: Required fields order date, customer, and at least one line item must be present.
readable.title: Create order API rejects request when order date is missing

readable.acText: Required fields order date, customer, and at least one line item must be present.
readable.title: Create order API rejects request when line items array is empty

readable.acText: Required fields order date, customer, and at least one line item must be present.
readable.title: Create order database does not persist partial data after required-field validation failure

readable.acText: Invalid product codes must be rejected.
readable.title: Valid product code order line is accepted and order is created

readable.acText: Invalid product codes must be rejected.
readable.title: Empty product code is rejected in the order entry form

readable.acText: Invalid product codes must be rejected.
readable.title: Unknown product code is rejected on order submission

readable.acText: Invalid product codes must be rejected.
readable.title: Product code with leading and trailing spaces is rejected

readable.acText: Invalid product codes must be rejected.
readable.title: Null product code payload is rejected by the API

readable.acText: Invalid product codes must be rejected.
readable.title: Security check rejects unauthorized order creation request with invalid product code

readable.acText: Tax should be calculated for taxable products.
readable.title: Tax calculation remains consistent when the same taxable order is created twice

readable.acText: Tax should be calculated for taxable products.
readable.title: Tax is calculated and stored for taxable order line items on order creation

readable.acText: Tax should be calculated for taxable products.
readable.title: Non-taxable product line item is created with zero tax amount

readable.acText: Tax should be calculated for taxable products.
readable.title: Mixed taxable and non-taxable line items calculate tax only for taxable products

readable.acText: Tax should be calculated for taxable products.
readable.title: Tax calculation rounds correctly for taxable product with fractional tax amount

readable.acText: Tax should be calculated for taxable products.
readable.title: Tax calculation is rejected when taxable product has missing tax jurisdiction data

readable.acText: Order creation event must be available to downstream integrations.
readable.title: Order creation event is available through the UI after saving a valid order

readable.acText: Order creation event must be available to downstream integrations.
readable.title: Order creation publishes event to downstream integration queue after successful API order creation

readable.acText: Order creation event must be available to downstream integrations.
readable.title: Order creation event is not published when order save is rejected by the UI

readable.acText: Order creation event must be available to downstream integrations.
readable.title: Order creation event remains available when the order is created with a single-line minimal valid payload

readable.acText: Order creation event must be available to downstream integrations.
readable.title: Order creation event payload contains transformed order values for downstream consumers

readable.acText: Order creation event must be available to downstream integrations.
readable.title: Order creation event is not duplicated when the same order is submitted once through the API

readable.acText: Order creation event must be available to downstream integrations.
readable.title: Order creation event is queued when downstream integration endpoint is temporarily unavailable

readable.acText: Only valid state transitions are allowed.
readable.title: Operations user updates order status from Packed to Shipped for order ORD-20481

readable.acText: Only valid state transitions are allowed.
readable.title: Database persists only valid status transition from Packed to Shipped for order ORD-20485

readable.acText: Only valid state transitions are allowed.
readable.title: API rejects invalid status transition from Delivered to Packed for order ORD-20482

readable.acText: Only valid state transitions are allowed.
readable.title: UI blocks transition from Cancelled to Shipped for order ORD-20483 and keeps current status unchanged

readable.acText: Only valid state transitions are allowed.
readable.title: API rejects unauthorized status update request for order ORD-20486

readable.acText: Only valid state transitions are allowed.
readable.title: API returns validation error when requested status is blank for order ORD-20484

readable.acText: Cancelled orders cannot move to shipped.
readable.title: UI prevents shipping a cancelled order from the order details screen

readable.title: Security control blocks unauthorized shipped transition attempt on cancelled order

readable.title: UI disables shipped option for a cancelled order status change

readable.acText: Cancelled orders cannot move to shipped.
readable.title: Database retains cancelled status after attempted shipped transition

readable.acText: Status updates must be visible in reporting and notifications.
readable.title: Order status change appears in reporting and notification feed for completed order update

readable.acText: Status updates must be visible in reporting and notifications.
readable.title: Reporting and notification records are created for a status update with a terminal state

readable.acText: Status updates must be visible in reporting and notifications.
readable.title: API status update is rejected when reporting and notification payload is missing required order identifier

readable.title: Reporting and notification visibility remains correct when an order status is updated from a long status history

readable.title: Reporting and notifications reflect a rapid sequence of two valid status changes for the same order
